Makes the risk dot a meaningful traffic light.

## Changed
- **An up-to-date container now shows a GREEN dot instead of a dead grey one.** A healthy box reads as a wall of green (matching Unraid's own green check) instead of a wall of grey that looked broken. Grey is now reserved for a single meaning: ShipLog could not resolve a version (for example an anonymous registry/GitHub rate limit) — set a GitHub token in Settings to grade it. Orange is a minor update, red a major one. The bubble's status pill matches the dot.

## Install / update
Update from the Plugins tab, or install by URL:
`https://raw.githubusercontent.com/junkerderprovinz/shiplog/main/plugin/shiplog.plg`
